name: cc-path
description: The principled path for AI-assisted development — harness health check, token budget analyzer, and interactive setup for Claude Code workspaces

scripts.prepack: mkdir -p harness/hooks harness/rules harness/skills && cp ../hooks/*.sh harness/hooks/ && cp ../rules/*.md harness/rules/ && cp ../skills/*.md harness/skills/ && cp ../harness/CLAUDE.md harness/CLAUDE.md

author: Jiho Shin
